question: How often do deadlines cause significant stress for you?
Do you feel supported by colleagues/manager?
How often do you work beyond regular hours?
Do you take regular short breaks away from screen?
How often do you feel burned out?
Do you keep boundaries between work and personal time?
How often do you worry about job security?
Do you get 7–8 hours of sleep on most nights?
How often do you feel irritable at work?
Do you practice any relaxation (walks, meditation, hobbies)?
How often do you skip meals because of work?
Do you feel in control of your workload most days?
